title: Jingle Bell Ranch
overview: When high-powered CEO, Laura, finds herself divorced and penniless due to a disastrous prenup, her life takes an unexpected turn. Determined to rise from the ashes and find her true purpose, she teams up with her quirky assistant, Miles, and embarks on a hilarious journey back to her grandma's forgotten farm.
